---
title: "About"
description: "About Arturo."
---

## About

Arturo Rosas is a customer service, sales, and project coordination professional based in Southern California. His experience centers on helping customers make informed decisions, coordinating expectations across clients and contractors, and supporting teams through training and product knowledge.

He currently works as an Appliance Category Advisor at Best Buy in West Covina, CA, where he delivers tailored customer solutions, resolves complex concerns, and mentors team members.

Arturo is pursuing a Bachelor of Science in International Business & Marketing at California State Polytechnic University, Pomona, with expected graduation in 2027. He previously earned associate degrees in Business Administration and Social and Behavioral Sciences from Mt. San Antonio College in 2023.

## Focus Areas

- Customer service and client communication
- Sales strategy and product knowledge
- Project coordination and timeline alignment
- Team training and development
- Bilingual Spanish communication

## Contact

[arturorosas9@gmail.com](mailto:arturorosas9@gmail.com) | [(909) 635-9143](tel:+19096359143) | [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/auro-ros-003a7286)
